description: Apply one or more named alert catalogs (pains, pains_a, brenk, tox, zinc, nibr, ...) to every molecule, writing a passes_<catalog> boolean column per catalog (True = molecule passes / no alert match).
rules: read-only — parses molecules and writes a results CSV; mutates nothing remote
INPUT may be .csv/.tsv (smiles column), .sdf, or .txt (one SMILES per line)
ALERTS is a comma-separated list of named catalogs (e.g. pains,brenk)
usage: Set INPUT (molecule file) and ALERTS (comma-separated catalog names). Output: alerts.csv.
limitation: Requires the medchem + datamol + rdkit + pandas stack (Python >=3.9); when absent the porter degrades gracefully and writes a stub so governance still runs offline. Unknown catalog names error at runtime inside medchem.
